nasb.text: The sons of Perez were: of Hezron, the family of the Hezronites; of Hamul, the family of the Hamulites.

esv.text: And the sons of Perez were: of Hezron, the clan of the Hezronites; of Hamul, the clan of the Hamulites.

cnv.text: 法勒斯的子孫，屬希斯崙的，有希斯崙家族；屬哈母勒的，有哈母勒家族。

ccb.text: 法勒斯的子孙有希斯伦族和哈姆勒族。
